Total Protein and Albumin/Globulin (A/G) Ratio 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/total-protein-and-albumin-globulin-a-g-ratio/ 
Total Protein and Albumin/Globulin (A/G) Ratio 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a total protein and albumin/globulin (A/G) ratio test? 
A total protein and albumin/globulin (A/G) ratio test measures the total amount of protein in your blood. Proteins have many important functions, including giving your body energy, rebuilding muscles, and
